items.title: Schedule 10-min call with Barak Perelman (Opti) about preemptive internal round
items.context: Email from barakp@opti.ai on May 29: 'We closed our first deal earlier this week...existing investors want to preempt with an internal quick round. Is it worth to catch up for 10 mins to share where everyone's at?' Available today after 2pm ET or Mon/Tue before 12pm.

items.title: Follow up with Roy Katmor (Orchid) if no response on round dynamics by Jun 2
items.context: Jake emailed roy@orchid.security on May 27 asking for the latest on round dynamics. Roy's last response (May 6) said he passed on a TS and expects more in coming weeks. No reply yet to Jake's follow-up.

items.title: Prep for NYTW CISO Breakfast with Thoropass (Jun 2)
items.context: Calendar event 'HOLD: NYTW / CISO Breakfast' on Jun 2 at 8:30-10am ET at 114 Crosby St with Thoropass attendees (Claire Lamb, Javier Santin) and Fin team (Lauren, Jake, Jackie, Matthew).
